action.reasoning: Observation: Eval with 3 models gave AP=0.2838 — same as 2-model ensemble. The predict.py only ensembles candidates ['best.pt', 'm2.pt', 'm1.pt'] — m3.pt is NOT included! That's why no improvement. Analysis: I need to fix predict.py to include all .pt files in the checkpoints dir. Decision: Update predict.py to glob all .pt files in checkpoint dir, then submit eval.
